description_long: This object is a rectangular, stone-like block with a weathered surface, resembling a commemorative or memorial book. The front face features an engraved inscription, though the text is partially faded and difficult to read, suggesting significant age and exposure to the elements. The sides and back are plain, with a rough, mottled texture in shades of brown, tan, and green, likely due to moss or lichen growth. The top is flat and similarly weathered, with some discoloration and minor surface irregularities. The overall form is solid and blocky, with no visible hinges, openings, or separable parts. Its substantial size and material indicate it is intended as a permanent fixture, possibly as a marker or monument in an urban park or walkway.
description: A weathered, stone-like commemorative block with an engraved inscription on the front and rough, mottled surfaces on the sides and back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the engraved inscription, with visible weathering and discoloration.
description_view_1: The left side is plain, with a greenish, mossy texture and no visible markings.
description_view_2: The back is featureless, displaying a uniform, reddish-brown stone surface.
description_view_3: The right side is similar to the left, with a mottled green and tan surface and no inscriptions.
attribute_title_text: SENIOR WALK DEDICATED AS AN EXPRESSION OF LOVE THAT MAY BE CHERISHED WITH AFFECTION AND LOYALTY BY THE SENIOR CLASSES OF THE CLASS OF 1926
